title: Uruguayan Dulce de Leche Pudding
description: A rich and creamy dessert inspired by traditional Uruguayan dulce de leche, made with a velvety pudding and topped with a fluffy dollop of whipped cream.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together the milk, sugar, and pudding mix.
Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Remove from heat and stir in the dulce de leche and vanilla extract.
Pour the pudding into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or until chilled.
Top with fluffy whipped cream before serving.
